title: knautia arvensis var. carpophylax
intro: Knautia arvensis var. carpophylax, also known as the field scabious or knautia, is a perennial plant species in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis var. carpophylax include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
